scripts.dev: npx --yes concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:backend:local" "npm run dev:frontend:local"
scripts.dev:backend:local: set PORT=3001&& npm --prefix backend run dev
scripts.dev:frontend:local: set VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3001&& npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --port 5175
